final_explanation:
Based on the AI model's prediction,
The fact that there is no checking account, because it is associated with a lower estimated risk, is known in the literature as a signal that decreases credit risk, and the model also identifies it as a factor that decreases risk.[1]
The fact that the credit history includes critical accounts or other existing credits, because financial ratios and account data serve as standard predictors for classifying default, is known in the literature as a signal that decreases credit risk, and the model also identifies it as a factor that decreases risk.[2]
The fact that the loan duration is measured in months, because longer terms increase the likelihood of risk, is known in the literature as a signal that increases credit risk, but the model instead identifies it as a factor that decreases risk.[3]
Overall, this applicant is likely to have a low risk of default.

final_explanation_ko:
본 AI가 예측한 결과에 따르면,\n계좌 잔액 부족은 신용 위험을 낮추는 신호로 인식되며, 본 모델은 이를 위험 감소 요인으로 판단합니다 [1].
신용 문제 이력이나 다른 기존 대출이 포함된 신용 기록은 채무 불이행 예측의 표준 지표로 알려져 있어, 본 모델 역시 이를 위험 감소 요인으로 식별합니다 [2].
대출 기간이 길수록 위험 증가 요인으로 여겨지지만, 본 모델은 이를 위험 감소 요인으로 해석합니다 [3].
전반적으로 이 고객은 채무 불이행 위험이 낮은 수준으로 평가됩니다.
